tips_en: Start with DataFlex if you want a practical, unified way to improve LLM training with dynamic data selection, mixture optimization, and reweighting – its modular trainer abstractions and speed gains make it easy to adopt and compare. The other two papers on streaming video (SIMPLESTREAM) and steerable visual representations (SteerViT) can later be integrated into DataFlex pipelines, especially if you need low‑memory video processing or language‑guided vision control.
tips_zh: 如果你的目标是提升大语言模型的训练效率，建议先阅读 DataFlex，它通过统一的训练器抽象和模块化插件实现动态数据选择、混合优化和样本重加权，同时带来了显著的速度提升。后续可以将 SIMPLESTREAM（低内存视频流理解）和 SteerViT（语言引导的可控视觉表示）纳入 DataFlex 的工作流，以实现更全面的多模态模型训练。
